chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3994 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.16792/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.01.2025 Mr. Hamza Waheed, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munawwar Ali Memon, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner impugnes show cause notice. It is further stated that the petitioner shall contest the notice before the issuing authority, who may be please to adjudicate the same expeditiously after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further stated that it may be just and proper for the respondent department to not take any coercive action against the petitioner pending adjudication as aforesaid. Counsel for the respondent is present and states that it may be just and proper to dispose of the petition in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
